summary: The user is seeking song recommendations and exploring music similar to John Mayer, whom they will see in concert on May 10th. They also attended a music festival featuring The Killers on April 17th and 18th, and expressed interest in discovering new music and artists.
facts: The user bought tickets to see John Mayer in concert on May 10th. The user attended a music festival featuring The Killers on April 17th and 18th. The Killers played hits like "Mr. Brightside," "Somebody Told Me," and "When You Were Young" at the festival. The user is interested in exploring blues-rock music and plans to start with Ben Harper's album "Burn to Shine" and Gary Clark Jr.'s album "Blak and Blu." The user is looking for music blogs or websites to help discover new music. The user enjoys John Mayer's guitar-driven sound and is excited about the concert experience. The user has been listening to a lot of music lately.
